title: Disc Fragments
description: Adds Disc Fragments for Music Discs and changes Minecraft's loot in the process. Includes Chase The Skies' Tears!
body:
# 💿 Disc Fragments 🪨
![Disc Fragment 'cat', Disc Fragment '11', Disc Fragment 'Relic' & Disc Fragment 'blocks'](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zEe3R6r8/images/7892680a4c4de79d4f3b7d3d6dc2ab7ce98c5bd3.png)

# ✅ Features
- **18 new Disc Fragments** can be gathered through Creepers & Chests
- **All Music Discs have been replaced** in Loot Tables with their respective Disc Fragments.
- **Distribution remains unchanged** for where to find them, allowing datapacks like [Disc Discovery](https://modrinth.com/datapack/disc-discovery) & [Re-disc-tribution](https://modrinth.com/datapack/re-disc-tribution) to work with this mod.

![Disc Fragment 'Precipice', Disc Fragment 'Creator (Music Box)', Disc Fragment 'Creator' & Disc Fragment 'mall'](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zEe3R6r8/images/de8a513945b7a34760a05fa5434a6eaf62fef957.png)

# 🔨 Crafting
![A GIF showing 9 Disc Fragments combined to create their respective Music Disc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/zEe3R6r8/images/e0e6b3170d8025ab27c446a9742cf69d3c700db9.gif)
